languages.text: "Центральный генератор благословлял исследовательский лагерь энергией. Вероятно, спустя столько лет одиночества, его машинный дух забыл слова гальванических гимнов и угас. Я смогу напомнить ему о долге и поделиться Движущей Силой из своей плоти. Но для этого нужно добраться до него".

traits.locale_text: "Центральный генератор благословлял исследовательский лагерь энергией. Вероятно, спустя столько лет одиночества, его машинный дух забыл слова гальванических гимнов и угас. Я смогу напомнить ему о долге и поделиться Движущей Силой из своей плоти. Но для этого нужно добраться до него".

languages.text: "The central generator once blessed the research camp with power. After so many years of solitude, its machine spirit has likely forgotten the words of the Galvanic Hymns and fallen dormant. I can remind it of its duty and share the Motive Force from my own flesh. But, to do that, we must reach it first."
languages.original_text: "Центральный генератор благословлял исследовательский лагерь энергией. Вероятно, спустя столько лет одиночества, его машинный дух забыл слова гальванических гимнов и угас. Я смогу напомнить ему о долге и поделиться Движущей Силой из своей плоти. Но для этого нужно добраться до него".

traits.locale_text: "The central generator used to bless the research camp with power. After so many years of solitude, its Machine Spirit has likely forgotten the words of the Galvanic Hymns and fallen dormant. I can remind it of its duty and share the Motive Force from my own flesh. But to do that, we must reach it first."

"The central generator used to bless the research camp with power. After so many years of solitude, its Machine Spirit has likely forgotten the words of the Galvanic Hymns and fallen dormant. I can remind it of its duty and share the Motive Force from my own flesh. But to do that, we must reach it first."

"The central generator once blessed the research camp with power. After so many years of solitude, its machine spirit has likely forgotten the words of the Galvanic Hymns and fallen dormant. I can remind it of its duty and share the Motive Force from my own flesh. But, to do that, we must reach it first."

"The central generator once blessed the research camp with power. After so many years of solitude, its machine spirit has likely forgotten the words of the Galvanic Hymns and fallen dormant. I can remind it of its duty and share the Motive Force from my own flesh. But, to do that, we must reach it first."

languages.text: "Der Zentralgenerator segnete das Forschungslager einst mit Energie. Nach so vielen Jahren der Einsamkeit hat sein Maschinengeist die Worte der galvanischen Hymnen vermutlich vergessen und ist eingeschlafen. Ich kann ihn an seine Pflicht erinnern und die Antriebskraft meines eigenen Fleisches mit ihm teilen. Aber dazu müssen wir erst zu ihm gelangen."
languages.original_text: "The central generator once blessed the research camp with power. After so many years of solitude, its machine spirit has likely forgotten the words of the Galvanic Hymns and fallen dormant. I can remind it of its duty and share the Motive Force from my own flesh. But, to do that, we must reach it first."

traits.locale_text: "Der Zentralgenerator segnete das Forschungslager einst mit Energie. Nach so vielen Jahren der Einsamkeit hat sein Maschinengeist die Worte der galvanischen Hymnen vermutlich vergessen und ist eingeschlafen. Ich kann ihn an seine Pflicht erinnern und die Antriebskraft meines eigenen Fleisches mit ihm teilen. Aber dazu müssen wir erst zu ihm gelangen."

languages.text: « Autrefois, le camp de recherche bénéficiait de la bénédiction du générateur central. Au fil de ces longues années de solitude, son esprit de la machine a sans doute peu à peu oublié les hymnes galvaniques et a fini par s'endormir. Je pourrais lui rappeler ses devoirs en lui offrant une partie de la Force Motrice de ma propre chair. Mais pour cela, nous devons nous rapprocher de lui. »
languages.original_text: "The central generator once blessed the research camp with power. After so many years of solitude, its machine spirit has likely forgotten the words of the Galvanic Hymns and fallen dormant. I can remind it of its duty and share the Motive Force from my own flesh. But, to do that, we must reach it first."

traits.locale_text: « Autrefois, le camp de recherche bénéficiait de la bénédiction du générateur central. Au fil de ces longues années de solitude, son esprit de la machine a sans doute peu à peu oublié les hymnes galvaniques et a fini par s'endormir. Je pourrais lui rappeler ses devoirs en lui offrant une partie de la Force Motrice de ma propre chair. Mais pour cela, nous devons nous rapprocher de lui. »

languages.text: “中央发电机曾经为研究营地提供祝福的能源。但经年累月的孤寂之后，它的机魂恐怕早已忘记了流电赞美诗的词句，陷入了休眠。我可以提醒它自身的职责，并从我的血肉中将源力分享给它。但要做到这一点，我们得先找到它才行。”
languages.original_text: "The central generator once blessed the research camp with power. After so many years of solitude, its machine spirit has likely forgotten the words of the Galvanic Hymns and fallen dormant. I can remind it of its duty and share the Motive Force from my own flesh. But, to do that, we must reach it first."

traits.locale_text: “中央发电机曾经为研究营地提供祝福的能源。但经年累月的孤寂之后，它的机魂恐怕早已忘记了流电赞美诗的词句，陷入了休眠。我可以提醒它自身的职责，并从我的血肉中将源力分享给它。但要做到这一点，我们得先找到它才行。”

languages.text: «El generador central bendecía al campamento de investigación con su energía, pero, tras años de soledad, es probable que su espíritu máquina haya olvidado los himnos galvánicos y se haya adormecido. Podré recordarle su deber y compartir con él la Fuerza Motriz de mi carne, pero, para ello, debemos llegar a él».
languages.original_text: "The central generator once blessed the research camp with power. After so many years of solitude, its machine spirit has likely forgotten the words of the Galvanic Hymns and fallen dormant. I can remind it of its duty and share the Motive Force from my own flesh. But, to do that, we must reach it first."

traits.locale_text: «El generador central bendecía al campamento de investigación con su energía, pero, tras años de soledad, es probable que su espíritu máquina haya olvidado los himnos galvánicos y se haya adormecido. Podré recordarle su deber y compartir con él la Fuerza Motriz de mi carne, pero, para ello, debemos llegar a él».

languages.text: 「かつて中央発電機は、研究キャンプに電力を供給していた。長年の孤独の末、その機械の精神はガルバニック賛歌の言葉を忘れ、休眠状態に陥ってしまったのだろう。私はその義務を思い出させ、私自身の肉体から動力源を分け与えることができる。しかし、そのためには、まず私たちが到達しなければならない」。
languages.original_text: "The central generator once blessed the research camp with power. After so many years of solitude, its machine spirit has likely forgotten the words of the Galvanic Hymns and fallen dormant. I can remind it of its duty and share the Motive Force from my own flesh. But, to do that, we must reach it first."

languages.text: "Merkezî jeneratör, bir zamanlar araştırma kampına güç sağlıyordu. Onca yıllık yalnızlığın ardından makine ruhu muhtemelen Galvaniz İlahisi'nin sözlerini unutmuş ve uykuya dalmıştır. Ona vazifesini hatırlatabilir ve kendi bedenimdeki Devinim Gücü'nü paylaşabilirim. Ancak bunu yapmak için önce ona ulaşmalıyız."
languages.original_text: "The central generator once blessed the research camp with power. After so many years of solitude, its machine spirit has likely forgotten the words of the Galvanic Hymns and fallen dormant. I can remind it of its duty and share the Motive Force from my own flesh. But, to do that, we must reach it first."

traits.locale_text: "Merkezî jeneratör, bir zamanlar araştırma kampına güç sağlıyordu. Onca yıllık yalnızlığın ardından makine ruhu muhtemelen Galvaniz İlahisi'nin sözlerini unutmuş ve uykuya dalmıştır. Ona vazifesini hatırlatabilir ve kendi bedenimdeki Devinim Gücü'nü paylaşabilirim. Ancak bunu yapmak için önce ona ulaşmalıyız."
